# [README is generated by chatGPT]

## About The Project

This project was created to practice fundamental front-end development skills by recreating a landing page from a provided design.

The main goal of the project was to improve my understanding of page layout, element positioning, and Flexbox.

## Skills Practiced

During this project I practiced:

- Structuring web pages with semantic HTML
- Building layouts using Flexbox
- Aligning and positioning elements
- Working with spacing, margins, and padding
- Organizing CSS styles
- Using Git and GitHub for version control

## Built With

- HTML5
- CSS3
- Flexbox
- Git
- GitHub
